summary: Comprehensive testing of Servall Hiring OS structural changes completed. CEO dashboard with split views, lead enrichment, role-based access control, and notification system all working correctly. Minor issue with missing user credentials for some test accounts.

minor_issues.issue: Marketing Manager and Sr HR login credentials not working
minor_issues.impact: Cannot test these specific roles, but similar roles tested successfully
minor_issues.details: marketing.mgr@servall.com and srhr@servall.com return 401 Invalid credentials

minor_issues.issue: Branch selection field detection unclear - may be false positive
minor_issues.details: Visual inspection shows only Name, Email, Password, Role fields as expected

passed_tests: CEO login with admin@servall.com/ServallAdmin@123
CEO Dashboard shows top metrics (Total Leads: 23, Total Hirings: 2, Total Employees: 2, Calls Done: 32)
CEO Dashboard split tabs: Technician Hiring (FDE) and Head Office Hiring (HR)
Lead table shows enriched data: Name, Exp, Date, Role, Salary, Assigned, Interview, Stage columns
Lead enrichment working: 5-6 out of 6 fields enriched per lead
Technician hiring section: 9 jobs, 17 leads split by source (Meta Ads: 6, Job Portals: 5, Manual: 6)
HO hiring section: 1 job, 5 leads
Call tracking section: 4 executives with call details expandable
Pipeline stats display correctly with color coding
Notification bell in header with badge count
HR Executive login (hr.exec@servall.com/Servall@123) shows executor dashboard
HR Executive does NOT see User Management in sidebar (correct)
HR Executive does NOT see Audit Logs in sidebar (correct)
Franchise Executive login (franchise.exec@servall.com/Servall@123) shows executor dashboard
Franchise Executive leads pipeline loads without errors
Franchise Executive does NOT see User Management in sidebar (correct)
Franchise Executive does NOT see Audit Logs in sidebar (correct)
CEO can access User Management page
Create User dialog has required fields: Name, Email, Password, Role
Users API returns list for ALL authenticated roles (including executors)
Notifications API /api/notifications/unread-count works for all users
User management restrictions: HR Executive blocked from creating users (403)
Dashboard API returns new structure for CEO with top_metrics, technician_hiring, ho_hiring, call_tracking
Backend API authentication working correctly
Role-based dashboard access working correctly
Chat system access control working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Verify Marketing Manager (marketing.mgr@servall.com) and Sr HR (srhr@servall.com) user accounts exist in database with correct credentials. All other functionality working correctly.
